whoWeAre.title: Who We Are
whoWeAre.p1: iShine Technology partners with global retailers and beauty leaders — including Costco, RoseSkinCo, and KU2 Cosmetics — to deliver innovative home-use IPL hair removal devices. We help brands expand into the fast-growing beauty-tech market with products that combine advanced technology, safety, and design excellence.
whoWeAre.p2: As a full-service OEM & ODM manufacturer, we provide end-to-end solutions: from concept design and prototyping to large-scale production, custom packaging, and worldwide logistics.
whoWeAre.p3: Our team collaborates closely with brand owners, product managers, sourcing specialists, and designers to ensure every project is delivered on time, on budget, and aligned with brand identity.
whoWeAre.p4: With successful partnerships across the Middle East, Germany, and Turkey, iShine has earned the trust of leading companies by turning ideas into market-ready IPL devices that drive growth and customer loyalty.

whyWork.title: Why Work with iShine?
whyWork.description: We're not ones to sing our own praises so we'll leave that to our clients! Here are some nice things they have to say about us.

costco.testimonial: iShine's IPL devices have exceeded our expectations. The quality and reliability are outstanding, making them perfect for our retail customers.

roseskin.testimonial: Working with iShine has been a game-changer for our beauty business. Their custom solutions and support are unmatched in the industry.

ku2.testimonial: The precision and innovation in iShine's IPL technology have helped us deliver exceptional results to our European customers.

header.title: Advanced Cooling Systems
header.description: State-of-the-art cooling technologies including sapphire and semiconductor cooling for safe and comfortable IPL treatments

intro.title: Revolutionary Cooling Technology
intro.paragraph: Our advanced cooling systems represent the pinnacle of IPL comfort and safety technology. By integrating cutting-edge sapphire contact cooling and intelligent temperature management, we ensure every treatment session is not only effective but also remarkably comfortable for users.

highlight.paragraph: Effective cooling is crucial for IPL device performance, user comfort, and treatment safety. Our systems maintain optimal skin temperature while maximizing treatment efficacy.

items.safety: Reduced risk of thermal damage to skin

header.title: IPL Components & Parts
header.description: High-quality components delivering performance, safety and reliability

intro.title: Component Quality Determines Device Performance
intro.paragraph: At iShine, we understand that the quality of each component determines the performance of the entire IPL device. From lamp cartridges to cooling systems, each part is carefully engineered and rigorously tested to meet international standards.

lamp.title: Lamp Cartridges
lamp.paragraph: Lamp cartridges are the core of IPL devices, determining energy output quality and device lifespan. Our high-performance lamps use advanced xenon technology to provide stable light energy output and extended lifespan, ensuring consistency and effectiveness for each treatment.

filter.title: Optical Filters
filter.paragraph: Optical filters play a crucial role in filtering harmful wavelengths and ensuring safe treatments. Our precision filter technology can precisely control spectral output, protecting skin from UV damage while maximizing treatment effectiveness.

cooling.title: Cooling System
cooling.paragraph: Cooling systems are essential for user comfort and skin protection. Our advanced cooling technologies, including sapphire contact cooling and semiconductor refrigeration, reduce discomfort during treatment while protecting skin from thermal damage.

power.title: Power Supply
power.paragraph: Reliable power supply is the foundation of IPL device safety and performance. Our power systems comply with global standards, providing stable energy output and adapting to different countries and regions.

quality.title: Quality & Testing
quality.partnership: Partnership with Intertek for component-level testing

durability.title: Durability Testing
durability.description: Simulating long-term use to ensure component performance across lifecycle

safety.title: Safety Testing
safety.description: Electrical and thermal performance testing to ensure user safety

performance.title: Performance Verification
performance.description: Measuring key parameters such as light output and energy stability

compliance.title: Compliance Certification
compliance.description: Ensuring components comply with industry standards and regulations

customization.title: Customization Options
customization.description: Components can be customized to your brand requirements, ensuring your IPL device stands out

cta.title: Build Your IPL Solution
cta.description: Whether you need complete devices or specific components, talk to us to discuss your requirements.

header.title: Optical Filters
header.description: Precision optical filters for safe and effective IPL treatments

intro.title: The Science of Safe Light Therapy
intro.paragraph: Optical filters ensure only safe and effective wavelengths reach the skin while blocking harmful light. These precision-engineered components define therapeutic capabilities and transform raw light energy into targeted treatment solutions.

highlight.paragraph: Filter quality and precision directly affect treatment safety, effectiveness and user comfort.

safety.title: Safety
safety.description: Blocks harmful UV and unwanted wavelengths so only therapeutic light reaches skin.

precision.title: Precision
precision.description: Targeted wavelengths for specific treatments enabling a single device to address multiple skin concerns.

performance.title: Performance
performance.description: High transmission efficiency delivers maximum energy while minimizing power needs.

durability.title: Durability
durability.description: Premium materials like sapphire and coated glass maintain performance under heat over years of use.

specs.title: Technical Specifications
specs.footnote: * Specifications can be customized for specific device requirements and target markets.

types.title: Types of Filters
types.description: We offer a range of filter solutions for different product requirements

fixed.title: Fixed Filters
fixed.description: Integrated permanently into the device for consistent performance and simplified UX

replaceable.title: Replaceable Filters
replaceable.description: Interchangeable filters enabling multi-function use in a single device

specialized.title: Specialized Filters
specialized.description: Targeted wavelength ranges for acne, pigmentation and skin rejuvenation

wavelengths.title: Wavelength Ranges
wavelengths.description: Customized wavelength ranges for treatment goals and markets.

shape.title: Shape & Size
shape.description: Form factors tailored to device designs and treatment windows.

material.title: Material Choice
material.description: Choose premium sapphire or coated glass depending on durability and cost.

branding.description: Packaging, color schemes and branding elements for replaceable filters.

wavelength.description: Spectral analysis to verify transmission and blocking characteristics

transmission.description: Long-duration testing for consistent optical properties over lifetime

heat.description: Thermal stress testing to validate performance under intensive conditions

durability.title: Durability Tests
durability.description: Accelerated aging and mechanical stress testing for long-term reliability

hair.title: Hair Removal
hair.description: Targeting hair follicles while protecting surrounding skin

skin.title: Skin Rejuvenation
skin.description: Filters supporting collagen production and skin renewal

acne.title: Acne Treatment
acne.description: Light therapy targeting inflammation and bacteria

pigmentation.description: Special wavelengths to break down melanin safely

hero.title: About iShine
hero.description: Leading manufacturer of IPL hair removal devices, dedicated to helping brands succeed from concept to market

whoWeAre.title: Who We Are
whoWeAre.p1: iShine is a professional home-use IPL hair removal device manufacturer based in Guangzhou, China. Since our founding, we have been dedicated to one mission: helping brands bring innovative IPL devices to market.
whoWeAre.p2: We specialize in complete OEM/ODM solutions, offering everything from initial design and prototyping to mass production, packaging, and global logistics. Our team works closely with brand owners, product managers, and designers across different industries to ensure project success.
whoWeAre.p3: With partnerships spanning North America, Europe, and Asia, we've earned trust from leading brands including Costco Canada, ROSESKINCO USA, and KU-2 Cosmetic Germany.

coreValues.title: Our Core Values
coreValues.description: The principles that guide everything we do

missionDriven.title: Mission Driven
missionDriven.description: Empowering brands with innovative IPL solutions that transform the beauty industry.

customerFocused.title: Customer Focused
customerFocused.description: Building lasting partnerships through exceptional service and reliable delivery.

innovationFirst.title: Innovation First
innovationFirst.description: Continuously advancing IPL technology to meet evolving market demands.

qualityExcellence.title: Quality Excellence
qualityExcellence.description: Maintaining the highest standards in manufacturing and quality control.
